sourceTitle: AI & Academic Integrity | Center for Teaching Innovation
evidenceSnippetOriginal: When generative AI is permitted, clarify expectations for documentation and attribution, as well as what aspects of the work should be produced by the students themselves. ... students should attribute directly quoted text to the creator of the generative AI tool used (e.g., cite OpenAI when directly quoting ChatGPT). This attribution should be used for both in-text citations and your reference list.
evidenceLocator: Opening guidance paragraph and AS-UA sample policy language section
